posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us in a webinar to learn about Make’s automation capabilities from Jordan Van Maanen, Make’s Value Engineer. Gain confidence in scaling your automations with Tom Cox, Senior Automation Engineer at Polished Geek.

They’ll be joined by our very own Michael Harrison, who will share how organizations are maximizing the value of Make within monday.com.

See you on December 3 at 1-2PM EST.
Register here: Scale with Confidence: How to Manage Growing Automation

Bonus: Attendees get geeky goodies made for automation pros!
